text.message: Yeah I have not made any cards this game to fight army
How do you not block green?
bro i moved the robber on him
I need to settle so someone needs to trade me or I give them to him lol
bro stop trading green rock lmao
this is how he gets army
Then you trade me or stop crying
bro you're handing him the win
I basically only make 2 resources so I have no choice
Then trade i offered it for any card
Help the game out or dont say anything
we have no obligation to trade, you are handing green the win
here comes a city with green's rock!
I have no obligation to not trade when I need cards and no one else does
bro yes you do green is at 8 lmao
you absolutely have an obligation not to trade to the by far leader of this game
I do not... if you both accept and I pick him different story
Want me to not trade him help me get the settle I've been after for 9 rounds of rolls
I need brick and I can
i can build a settle with this
now green is gonna get that and win
Why would I extend for you
becasue green is about to win
Couldn't trade me 1 resource for 11 rounds
bro check the script i've traded you sheep
Naw just no incentive for me to extend
